channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ Mod ] Bucket Toilet [ Gnome Chompski ]
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
Replace Gnome Chompski with a Bucket Toilet, comes with a custom texture for peanut gallery gnome sign in Dark Carnival: Fairgrounds. Includes 2 version: default skin / golden skin (yet to be released) [Bonus] Golden ver has not been released yet, watch the video to receive hidden info for the release day file list: bucket toilet[gnome]1.02.vpk To install, place the vpk into your game directory, inside the addons folder. (path of your steam folder)\Steam\steamapps\common\left 4 dead 2\left4dead2\addons\ credits: bucket model and texture : Valve edited by doe5493 /yt@catwithouthumanears known issue: - cl_viewmodelfovsurvivor should be below 71 or first-person view may looks weird. - shiny effect for the golden ver. requires shader detail set to be high. - do not active both version at the same time. - warning: toilet papers are not included always make sure to check for virus whatever you trying to download
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
Replace Gnome Chompski with a Bucket Toilet, comes with a custom texture for peanut gallery gnome sign in Dark Carnival: Fairgrounds. Includes 2 version: default skin / golden skin (yet to be released) [Bonus] Golden ver has not been released yet, watch the video to receive hidden info for the release day file list: bucket toilet[gnome]1.02.vpk To install, place the vpk into your game directory, inside the addons folder. (path of your steam folder)\Steam\steamapps\common\left 4 dead 2\left4dead2\addons\ credits: bucket model and texture : Valve edited by doe5493 /yt@catwithouthumanears known issue: - cl_viewmodelfovsurvivor should be below 71 or first-person view may looks weird. - shiny effect for the golden ver. requires shader detail set to be high. - do not active both version at the same time. - warning: toilet papers are not included always make sure to check for virus whatever you trying to download

item.title: [ 4 Maps ] An Alternative Perspective vA4.2
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Sometime to solve an issue you need to look at it in a new perspective... unless the issue is the new perspective... --- This was originally made as a collab with another friend, two maps, two weeks, no communication with one agreed upon theme... but because I grew attached to this idea, I decided to run with it and see where I can take this bizarre concept~ This is very early in development, if you find bugs or have feedback, there is a discussion board on this mod or make your own... I ask and encourage all feedback~ I am trying to do something truly unique with the campaign, something you have never seen in other campaigns, so this kind of gameplay is uncharted in this game. If you really do hate it, believe it or not I do want to know, because "Standing Gauntlet" are a new type of event in this game in particular, and I do want to keep tweaking the numbers or bring down necessary sledge hammers till this is fun for majority of players~ I came out of retirement to make one more campaign... I want this to be the culmination of my time in this game and in the mapping scene for l4d2... This game has been an obsession of my since L4D1. I have seen the and lived through the golden age, seeing new incredbile campaigns posted on L4D2maps. I have seen when campaigns were teased, the work in progress flow and the rather common death of maps shared to quickly: Last Bastion, From Palms to Bombs, Life's a Beach. I was there to see the steady decline of campaigns, and the surgence from different cultures: like when "somefun" "greybox" and the first "hehe4" campaign came out. And even own campaigns and failures. I have 7 maps publicly available on the workshop. If you count Gamemaps, that is now 8, if you count mediafire links from 3rd party websites of review blogs, that is now 9, if you can somehow get dead links to work again on old forums, that is now 12... If you count the campaigns that were worked on enough to have a name a tag line? 29 maps. I love doing this, I love making maps. I love doing this
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Sometime to solve an issue you need to look at it in a new perspective... unless the issue is the new perspective... --- This was originally made as a collab with another friend, two maps, two weeks, no communication with one agreed upon theme... but because I grew attached to this idea, I decided to run with it and see where I can take this bizarre concept~ This is very early in development, if you find bugs or have feedback, there is a discussion board on this mod or make your own... I ask and encourage all feedback~ I am trying to do something truly unique with the campaign, something you have never seen in other campaigns, so this kind of gameplay is uncharted in this game. If you really do hate it, believe it or not I do want to know, because "Standing Gauntlet" are a new type of event in this game in particular, and I do want to keep tweaking the numbers or bring down necessary sledge hammers till this is fun for majority of players~ I came out of retirement to make one more campaign... I want this to be the culmination of my time in this game and in the mapping scene for l4d2... This game has been an obsession of my since L4D1. I have seen the and lived through the golden age, seeing new incredbile campaigns posted on L4D2maps. I have seen when campaigns were teased, the work in progress flow and the rather common death of maps shared to quickly: Last Bastion, From Palms to Bombs, Life's a Beach. I was there to see the steady decline of campaigns, and the surgence from different cultures: like when "somefun" "greybox" and the first "hehe4" campaign came out. And even own campaigns and failures. I have 7 maps publicly available on the workshop. If you count Gamemaps, that is now 8, if you count mediafire links from 3rd party websites of review blogs, that is now 9, if you can somehow get dead links to work again on old forums, that is now 12... If you count the campaigns that were worked on enough to have a name a tag line? 29 maps. I love doing this, I love making maps. I love doing this

item.title: [ Mod ] George A. Romero DEAD MODE (works MP)
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
READ WITH ATTENTION! ENG: For the mod to work in online multiplayer, you need to activate it in the addons menu, then START a SINGLE PLAYER game, go back to the menu and you can create your local game to PLAY Multi-player. Its very simple. PT/BR: Para o mod funcionar em multplayer online, você precisa ativa-lo no menu de addons, e depois entrar em uma partida SINGLE PLAYER, voltar o menu e poderá criar sua partida local multplayer. ES: Para que el mod funcione en multijugador en línea, debes activarlo en el menú de complementos, luego INICIAR un juego de UN SOLO JUGADOR, volver al menú y puedes crear tu juego local. _ This mod is not designed to play with NPCs MOD WORKS IN GAME MODES: CAMPAING/COOP REALISM SURVIVAL VERUS-SURVIVAL VERSUS VERSUS REALISM CAMPAING: -zombies are slow, like a living-dead -the dead really only die when they destroy their brains. -zombies make new noises. -There are no specials or tanks. -weapons with different recoils. -always first person -pistols need ammo. -pipe bombs are grenades , there is no vomiting bile. -more hordes. -zombies are strongs. among others... Versus: -Specials have no powers, but can deliver stronger punches, like ordinary zombies. -there is no melee -is similar to the campaign.
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
READ WITH ATTENTION! ENG: For the mod to work in online multiplayer, you need to activate it in the addons menu, then START a SINGLE PLAYER game, go back to the menu and you can create your local game to PLAY Multi-player. Its very simple. PT/BR: Para o mod funcionar em multplayer online, você precisa ativa-lo no menu de addons, e depois entrar em uma partida SINGLE PLAYER, voltar o menu e poderá criar sua partida local multplayer. ES: Para que el mod funcione en multijugador en línea, debes activarlo en el menú de complementos, luego INICIAR un juego de UN SOLO JUGADOR, volver al menú y puedes crear tu juego local. _ This mod is not designed to play with NPCs MOD WORKS IN GAME MODES: CAMPAING/COOP REALISM SURVIVAL VERUS-SURVIVAL VERSUS VERSUS REALISM CAMPAING: -zombies are slow, like a living-dead -the dead really only die when they destroy their brains. -zombies make new noises. -There are no specials or tanks. -weapons with different recoils. -always first person -pistols need ammo. -pipe bombs are grenades , there is no vomiting bile. -more hordes. -zombies are strongs. among others... Versus: -Specials have no powers, but can deliver stronger punches, like ordinary zombies. -there is no melee -is similar to the campaign.

item.title: [ 6 Maps ] Final Departure
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Left Behind II - Final Departure "Who will survive?" The survivors begin they journey from ' THE STATION ' and ' MILITARY BASE ' they must survive ' THE FOREST ' through ' THE TERRAIN ' and finally reach ' THE DEPARTURE (part 1 & 2) '. Their hope is none of them will be ' LEFT BEHIND II ' face the rapture! Poster [Preview] Created by: Dukkie Six map campaign: ------------------------- 1. Train Station 2. Military Base 3. The Forest 4. The Terrain 5. The Departure (Part 1) 6. Final Departure (Part 2) ====================================== Except under the accounts "ilcannibal" or "Trunten" or "Time Lord Magnum" or "1sg Heartless"
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Left Behind II - Final Departure "Who will survive?" The survivors begin they journey from ' THE STATION ' and ' MILITARY BASE ' they must survive ' THE FOREST ' through ' THE TERRAIN ' and finally reach ' THE DEPARTURE (part 1 & 2) '. Their hope is none of them will be ' LEFT BEHIND II ' face the rapture! Poster [Preview] Created by: Dukkie Six map campaign: ------------------------- 1. Train Station 2. Military Base 3. The Forest 4. The Terrain 5. The Departure (Part 1) 6. Final Departure (Part 2) ====================================== Except under the accounts "ilcannibal" or "Trunten" or "Time Lord Magnum" or "1sg Heartless"

item.title: [ Mod ] MAC-10 Bolt Locking Sound Removal
item.description:
View ArticleSteam Workshop
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
This removes the bolt locking sound from the MAC-10 deploy animation, since the gun is open bolt. Alternate file sources: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
View ArticleSteam Workshop
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
This removes the bolt locking sound from the MAC-10 deploy animation, since the gun is open bolt. Alternate file sources: Steam Workshop
